title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE RUMAYAS ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LUMBA-BAYABAO, PROVINCE OF LANAO DEL SUR, TO DAGALANGIT ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 368 / 58 OG No. 46, 7499 (November 12, 1962)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3496, June 16, 1962 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE RUMAYAS ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LUMBA-BAYABAO, PROVINCE OF LANAO DEL SUR, TO DAGALANGIT ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Rumayas Elementary School in the Municipality of Lumba-Bayabao, Province of Lanao del Sur, is changed to Dagalangit Elementary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 16, 1962.
